input.tenant_message: The elevator has been out of service since yesterday evening with no notice posted. I live on the 8th floor and my mother is visiting — she uses a wheelchair and cannot take the stairs. This is a serious accessibility issue and I need an update on when it will be fixed.

ai_output.recommended_action: Contact the elevator service contractor immediately to expedite repair, post a notice in the lobby with an estimated restoration time, and proactively reach out to all residents on upper floors — particularly those with mobility needs. Document ADA accommodation steps taken.
